face.structure: oval with slightly angular jawline, prominent cheekbones

details: slight upward tilt at the outer corners

face.expression: thoughtfully reserved with a hint of skepticism

skin.rendering_notes: utilize soft gradient to subtly enhance the bone structure

hair.flow: moderate length, reaching just below the ears with slight movement
details: a single stray lock occasionally falls over the forehead

character.aura: a sense of calm strategic focus and reserved nature

outfit.design: tailored grey blazer over a crisp white shirt
outfit.fit: perfectly tailored to accentuate a lean, athletic build

composition.framing: mid-torso up, centered slightly to the right
composition.pose: standing with arms crossed across the chest
composition.gesture: gazing slightly to the side with an intense focus

background.rules: background should remain subdued to highlight the character's expression and attire
